top_signals.title: Gold Declines as Middle East Risks Reinforce Higher Rates Bets
top_signals.summary: Gold fell for a second day as concerns that continued conflict in the Middle East will prolong inflation and keep borrowing costs elevated outweighed prospects of a US-Iran peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Slip as White House Rejects Iran Peace Deal Reports
top_signals.summary: US stocks shuffled between gains and losses on Wednesday, as strategists lifted their S&P 500 year-end targets following a strong earnings season and traders weighed conflicting reports on a deal to end the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Defense-driven demand powers surge in US listings by mining firms
top_signals.summary: This year’s transactions have brought producers of antimony, rare earths, tungsten and uranium to the NYSE and Nasdaq.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: BIS project finds tokenization could make cross-border payments faster, safer
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
